title: csInvsee
description: 🔍 A lightweight inventory inspection plugin for Paper 1.20+ IN DEVELOPPEMENT Supports real-time editing, permission control and ender chest viewing.
body:
🔍 csInvsee

csInvsee is a lightweight and secure inventory inspection plugin for
Paper 1.20.1 – 1.21.x.

It allows staff members to view and optionally modify other players’
inventories and ender chests in real time, with proper permission
control and safe synchronization.

✨ Features - View any online player’s inventory - View any online
player’s Ender Chest - Optional real-time editing - Permission-based
access system - Safe inventory syncing (no duplication glitches) - Fully
optimized for Paper - Configurable messages

![Example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/edb7e22b4a1896e1358ae0a9c01224664b7b2b46.png)

📖 Commands - /invsee — Open inspection menu - /invsee reload — Reload
configuration

🔐 Permissions - csinvsee.use - csinvsee.inventory -
csinvsee.enderchest - csinvsee.modify - csinvsee.reload

✔ Designed for moderation and staff use ✔ Lightweight and clean ✔ Java
17 required
